title: mikania microphylla
intro: Mikania microphylla, also known as Gotu Kola or Indian Pennywort, is a perennial plant native to tropical Asia and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mikania microphylla include improving cognitive function, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting wound healing. Mikania microphylla can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or topical cream, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to support overall well-being.
